content:
Aditya Gavhane
8177804906|gavhaneaditya718@gmail.com |LinkedIn |GitHub
Summary
Generative AI-focused Computer Science student with hands-on experience building backend RAG systems, multi-agent
workflows, and automation pipelines. Skilled in designing end-to-end GenAI applications using Python, LangChain,
CrewAI, vector databases, and n8n, with emphasis on accuracy, traceability, and system reliability.
Education
MIT Art, Design and T echnology , PuneAug 2022 – Jun 2026
B.Tech in Computer Science (AI & Analytics)
Technical Skills
Programming Languages: Python, Java, SQL
AI F rameworks: LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI
T ools: n8n, MySQL, Git, GitHub,Docker
Projects
Document-Based Retrieval System|Python, FastAPI, LangChain, Chroma, NLP|GitHub
• Built a backend RAG system that ingests PDF documents, performs text chunking, generates embeddings, and
stores them in a persistent vector database.
• Implemented retrieval-based question answering where responses are generated strictly from retrieved document
context to reduce hallucinations.
• Designed session-based document handling to allow incremental uploads and reuse of stored documents across
queries.
Multi-Agent Research & Review System|Python, CrewAI, Gemini 2.5 Flash, DeepSeek-R1, Tavily API|GitHub
• Built a multi-agent research pipeline with CrewAI where three AI agents — researcher, writer, and validator —
collaborate to produce fully cited, fact-checked documentation from live web search results.
• Enforced strict source grounding by requiring every written claim to include a verbatim quote citation, with an
automated validator agent scoring and rejecting hallucinated output.
• Tracked per-run accuracy metrics like verification rate and citation coverage, with automatic retry logic and
structured JSON reporting saved across runs.
Daily Remote Job Finder Automation|n8n, RSS Feeds, Google Sheets API, Gmail API|GitHub
• Built an automated workflow that fetches remote job listings from multiple RSS feeds at scheduled intervals.
• Processed and deduplicated job data using Google Sheets as a persistent state tracker.
• Generated and emailed structured HTML job digests automatically for continuous job monitoring.
Extracurricular Activities
Class Representative (2023–2024):Coordinated academic communication between students and faculty.
